channel.title: SteadiDay Blog - Health & Wellness for Adults 50+
channel.description: Health and wellness tips for adults 50+.

item.title: best-medication-reminder-apps-seniors.html
item.description: Compare the best medication reminder apps for seniors and caregivers in 2026 — Medisafe, Pill Reminder, CareZone, and more, reviewed side by side.

item.title: What You Get Wrong About Digestive Health After 50
item.description: Think you know your gut? These 5 common digestive health myths for seniors could be sabotaging your health. Here's what the research actually says.

item.title: GLP-1 Drugs, Medicare, and Frailty Risk: What's True
item.description: New Medicare coverage makes GLP-1 drugs accessible to millions of seniors — but a major study warns that frailty risk in older adults on tirzepatide is real. Here's what to know.

item.title: Skin Cancer Self Check: 5 Myths That Could Mislead You
item.description: Think you know how to spot skin cancer? These 5 common myths about skin cancer self check could put you at risk. Here's what the evidence actually says.

item.title: Cyclosporiasis Symptoms in Older Adults: What to Know
item.description: A 2026 outbreak has confirmed 843+ cyclosporiasis cases across 31 states. Here's why older adults face higher risk and what to do right now.

item.title: Health Screenings Over 50 You Shouldn't Skip
item.description: New guidelines have changed when and how often adults need key health screenings over 50. Here's what's updated, what the evidence shows, and what to do now.

item.title: 2026-07-06-the-new-covid19-prevention-pill.html
item.description: Xocova (ensitrelvir) is the first pill to prevent COVID-19 after an exposure. How it works, how it differs from Paxlovid, and who it's for after 50.

item.title: 2026-07-02-why-appetite-changes-as-we.html
item.description: Yes — appetite often drops after 50. Why you eat less as you get older, when it's worth a doctor visit, and simple ways to eat well and stay strong.

item.title: What Most People Get Wrong About Knee Osteoarthritis Pain Relief
item.description: A landmark 2026 Radiology study on GAE offers knee osteoarthritis pain relief without surgery. Here's what the evidence actually says—and what surprises most people.

item.title: The Real Health Benefits of Gardening After 50
item.description: Think gardening is just a hobby? Discover the surprising gardening health benefits seniors get — from heart health to sharper memory and less stress.

item.title: 2026-06-22-the-first-mrna-flu-vaccine.html
item.description: FDA advisory panel voted 9-0 to recommend Moderna's mFlusiva, the first mRNA flu vaccine for adults 50+. See trial results, timeline, and coverage details.

item.title: How to Build a Bedtime Routine That Actually Works
item.description: Discover how a simple bedtime routine for seniors can transform your sleep. Science-backed tips to help adults 50+ fall asleep faster and wake up refreshed.

item.title: Does Your Tap Water Raise Your Dementia Risk?
item.description: A major 27-year study links nitrate in drinking water to higher dementia risk — even below legal limits. Here's what to eat and drink to protect your brain.

item.title: Why Autoimmune Disease Hits Women Over 50 Hardest
item.description: Autoimmune disease in women over 50 is more common than most realize. Here are 5 things we wish we'd known sooner — backed by real science.

item.title: 2026-06-08-finerenone-for-chronic-kidney-disease.html
item.description: Three 2026 trials show finerenone slows chronic kidney disease beyond diabetes. See the results, risks, and alternatives to discuss with your doctor.

item.title: Community Gardens: Growing Food and Friendships After 50
item.description: Discover how community garden seniors programs boost health, reduce loneliness, and improve fitness. Real evidence, practical tips, and how to get started.

item.title: Moringa Supplement Recall Safety Alert for Adults 65+
item.description: The CDC's active Salmonella outbreak linked to moringa capsules has hit 119 people in 36 states. Here's what adults 50+ need to know now.

item.title: Travel Insurance After 50: A Complete Seniors Guide
item.description: Our travel insurance seniors guide walks you through exactly what to look for after 50—from medical evacuation to preexisting conditions. Don't leave home without this.

item.title: Semaglutide for Older Adults: 5 Things We Wish We'd Known
item.description: New pooled data from 6 STEP trials shows semaglutide for older adults delivers real weight loss and heart benefits. Here's what the science finally confirms.

item.title: Sleep Apnea Signs Seniors Shouldn't Ignore
item.description: New research shows sleep apnea raises serious heart risks in adults 50+. Learn the sleep apnea signs seniors miss and when to call your doctor.
